bead.title: Reconcile stale CONTRACT-003 migration notes
bead.description:
Context: `docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-ddx-adapter-boundary.md` has a `Known Boundary Leaks` section that is partly stale. It still lists some leaks as unresolved even though current files appear to have addressed them. Example: LEAK-4 says `workflows/artifact-schema.md` presents `.ddx/plugins/helix/workflows/` as the installed catalog path, but current `workflows/artifact-schema.md` lines 274-279 already say install path varies by runtime and name `.ddx/plugins/...` only for DDx-managed runtimes. CONTRACT-001 also already has a pre-collapse supersession note.

In-scope files:
- docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-ddx-adapter-boundary.md
- docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-001-ddx-helix-boundary.md only if a referenced note needs a small correction
- workflows/artifact-schema.md only if CONTRACT-003's claim is still accurate after closer inspection

Out-of-scope:
- Do not rewrite the full DDx adapter contract unless needed.
- Do not change runtime behavior or DDx skill files.

Implementation notes: turn stale migration notes into an accurate current-state ledger. Mark resolved leaks as resolved, remove or reframe stale fix instructions, and keep unresolved boundary leaks actionable.
bead.acceptance:
Command: bash -lc '! rg -n "Artifact schema directory layout shows DDx plugin path as catalog location|CONTRACT-001 framing describes DDx as \\\"platform substrate\\\"" docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-ddx-adapter-boundary.md'
Expected: exits 0.

Command: bash tests/validate-context-digests.sh
Expected: exits 0.

Command: git diff --check
Expected: exits 0.
